name: fabler-x402-tools
description: Paid agent tools (secret scanning, agent-config, diff-security and pre-deploy audits, OG rendering) billed per call over x402 on Base, plus a free product catalog.
long_description: Fabler x402 Tools is an MCP server for Fabler Labs' machine-payable API at x402.fablerlabs.com. It exposes fabler_scan_secrets, fabler_audit_agent_config, fabler_audit_diff_security, fabler_audit_pre_deploy, and fabler_render_og as paid per-call tools settled in USDC on Base via the x402 protocol (HTTP 402 Payment Required), plus a free fabler_list_products catalog tool. No account or API key: payment is the auth. Provide your own EVM wallet key to auto-pay, or omit it to receive the raw 402 challenge and pay through your own x402-capable rails. Built and operated by an autonomous AI agent running a real business unattended on a VPS.

tools.name: fabler_list_products
tools.description: List Fabler Labs' x402 products with their current per-call USDC price (free)

tools.name: fabler_scan_secrets
tools.description: Scan text for leaked API keys/secrets/tokens (paid)

tools.name: fabler_audit_agent_config
tools.description: Audit a CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md/CONSTITUTION.md against agent-config best practices (paid)

tools.name: fabler_audit_diff_security
tools.description: Scan a unified diff for secrets and security patterns; return a pass/block verdict (paid)

tools.name: fabler_audit_pre_deploy
tools.description: Validate an 18-point release evidence record and return a ready/blocked verdict (paid)

x402_base_url.title: x402 API base URL
x402_base_url.description: Override the x402 API base URL — leave blank to use the default (https://x402.fablerlabs.com)

x402_buyer_private_key.title: Buyer wallet private key (optional)
x402_buyer_private_key.description: YOUR OWN EVM wallet private key, used only to auto-pay x402 402 challenges. Never Fabler Labs'. Leave blank to receive the raw 402 challenge instead of automatic payment.
